title: About NepalDocs
subtitle: Your gateway to exploring Nepali documents
missionP1: NepalDocs is dedicated to making Nepali documents accessible and searchable for everyone...
missionP2: With advanced search capabilities and automatic translation features, we aim to bridge the gap between languages...
ctaBody: Start exploring Nepali documents with our powerful search tools.

features.title: Smart Search
features.description: Intelligent search that highlights matches and shows relevant results instantly.

features.title: Auto Translation
features.description: Type in English and get automatic translation to Nepali as you type.

features.title: Rich Documents
features.description: Browse beautifully formatted documents with text, images, tables, and lists.

features.title: Fast & Responsive
features.description: Lightning-fast search with smooth animations and mobile-friendly design.
